raw_consumer_statement:
I ordered a XXXX  XXXX learning pad with buttons from XXXX last XXXX. 
The amount of the purchase was {$140.00}. 
They sent the wrong item and it was dropped off at XXXX just as they asked with the code for returns. I have that receipt and it made it back to XXXX but XXXX didn't refund me. I disputed this with citi multiple times- probably ten times- with zero help. I honestly think they use AI to process disputes as this was very cut and dry and nothing was ever resolved. XXXX is a horrible company, and I won't be using them anymore, but Citi should have my back when things like this happen. 

I am attaching the order details on XXXX site, the dispute and reverse by Citi, and a copy of the drop off code that can be tracked back to XXXX. 

They did receive it! 

Yet no refund was issued. 

I would like for Citi to give me a credit from their end as it seems clear that this dispute was not handled correctly per XXXX / XXXX regulations. 

I did everything I could to help Citi process this dispute but need the CFPB now to step in and hopefully, it will finally be resolved. 

The weight of the package to and fro is EXACT. I returned exactly what was sent to me. 

thank you
